name: agent-transport
description: SIP and audio streaming transport for AI voice agents (pure Rust)

scripts.build: CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 napi build --release --no-js && npm run postbuild:check
scripts.build:debug: CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 napi build --no-js && npm run postbuild:check
scripts.postbuild:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const snap='index.d.ts.snapshot'; if (!fs.existsSync(snap)) process.exit(0); const cur=fs.existsSync('index.d.ts')?fs.statSync('index.d.ts').size:0; const ref=fs.statSync(snap).size; if (cur < ref/2) { console.error('[postbuild] index.d.ts shrank ('+cur+' < '+ref+' bytes); napi may have clobbered it — restoring snapshot.'); fs.copyFileSync(snap,'index.d.ts'); } fs.unlinkSync(snap)"
scripts.build:livekit: cd ../../node/agent-transport-livekit && npm run build && mkdir -p ../../crates/agent-transport-node/livekit && cp -r dist/* ../../crates/agent-transport-node/livekit/
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:livekit
